name: Ninjago Sword
info: Ninjago Fire Sword: Bring the power of fire to your collection with this 3D-printed Ninjago-inspired Fire Sword, designed with bold flame details and a striking metallic gold finish. This lightweight yet durable prop is perfect for cosplay, display, or imaginative play, featuring intricate layered designs that make it stand out on any shelf or in action. The comfortable handle and large size give it an authentic feel while remaining safe and easy to hold. Whether you're a Ninjago fan, collector, or looking for a unique gift, this eye-catching fire sword adds a powerful and heroic touch to any collection. 🔥
